hero.title:
Turn Your City
into an Epic
Playground
hero.description: Discover hidden secrets and share unforgettable quests with your closest friends. Your neighbourhood is the game.

generation.heading: AI Quest Generation
generation.description: AI crafts a unique quest based on your profile, city, history, and real-time location.

evidence.heading: Upload Evidence
evidence.description: Complete the objective and capture a moment of victory. Every proof adds to your legacy.

vouch.heading: Community Vouch
vouch.description: Your friends verify your feats, awarding XP and rare badges.

questGeneration.question: How are quests generated?
questGeneration.answer: Quests are generated using AI that analyzes your goals, preferences, and past activity. Each quest is uniquely tailored to push you just the right amount — challenging, but always achievable.

skipQuest.question: Can I skip a quest?
skipQuest.answer: Yes! You can skip a quest once per day without any penalty. Skipping more than once will cost you a small number of points, so choose wisely and save your skips for when you truly need them.

earnPoints.question: How do I earn points?
earnPoints.answer: Points are earned by completing quests, maintaining daily streaks, and hitting milestone goals. Bonus points are awarded for completing quests early or achieving them with extra precision.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up?
cta.description: Join thousands of friends already transforming their daily routines.
